creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 150340
Patch to upgrade net/turnserver to 3.2.5.2 (as a git commit)

Attached is a patch to upgrade net/turnserver to 3.2.5.2 (as a git commit).

Upstream release announcement:
   
[RFC5766-TURN-SERVER 1451] rfc5766-turn-server build 3.2.5.2 is available

This is a maintenance build:

- TLS connection procedure improved in uclient test program.
- Reliability improvements (Issue 141).
- external address mapping fixes for Amazon EC2.
- docs fixes.
